title: Kolaff
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Kolaff.png]] |name=Kolaff |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Starfall (adventure)|''Starfall'']] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height=1.8 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Steel-grey]] |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You are a pathetic commander who must rely on wild schemes and inane plottings to make up for your lack of military competence.|[[Lira Wessex/Legends|Lira Wessex]], to Kolaff|}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Kolaff''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|We are about to win a great victory against our enemies.''"
"''Victory? Captain, that pirate fleet caught you off guard and devastated your vessel. I do not see running away as a victory.''"
"''Not running, my lady, tactically retreating.|Kolaff and [[Lira Wessex/Legends|Lira Wessex]]|}} Kolaff was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]], serving the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A brilliant tactician and leader, Kolaff was considered to be one of the Imperial Navy's most competent and able combat commanders. However, Kolaff had a love of battle, and gained a reputation for stringing out assignments that should have been completed quickly in order to savor the thrill of battle. Eventually, his methods earned him a transfer to the [[Relgim sector/Legends|Relgim sector]], where he was assigned to command a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]], including his personal command, the [[Subjugator (Victory-class)|''Subjugator'']]. During the Galactic Civil War, Kolaff was ordered to take the ''Subjugator'' to [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]] with [[Lira Wessex/Legends|Lira Wessex]], wife of Relgim sector's [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Denn Wessex]]. Their mission was simple; to capture Lira Wessex's father, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] [[Walex Blissex/Legends|Walex Blissex]]. Blissex had been lured out of hiding by reports that his daughter was dying and wished to see him once more; reports that had been faked to capture him and interrogate him for engineering knowledge. Shortly after capturing Blissex and the Alliance agents escorting him, the ''Subjugator'' was [[Attack on the Subjugator|attacked]] by the Alliance's [[Task Force Starfall]], who had no idea Blissex was aboard. The ''Subjugator'' was heavily damaged in the confrontation, and Kolaff ordered the ship's [[Self-destruct mechanism/Legends|self-destruct mechanism]] activated, intending to detonate the ship when the Alliance fleet re-engaged. Blissex and the Alliance agents escaped, however, and Kolaff eventually met them in combat using [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]] in [[hangar bay G-12]]. ==Personality and traits== Kolaff was a tall man, standing 1.8 [[Meter/Legends|meters]], and had square shoulders. Always immaculately dressed in his uniform, his hair was neatly cut and he had [[Color/Legends|steel-grey]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Kolaff did not hate the Alliance, and actually admired their bravery and courage. He was intelligent and confident of his own abilities, with a smug and sarcastic attitude. His love of battle was an overriding obsession in his life, and he considered himself to be invincible. ==Skills and abilities== Kolaff was trained in the use of a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], as well as [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]]. An able commander and tactician, Kolaff was also knowledgeable about [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucratic]] procedure. He was able to fly [[Starship/Legends|starships]], pilot All Terrain Scout Walkers, and override security systems. ==Equipment== Kolaff wore an Imperial uniform that was always clean, and carried a blaster and [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. During the battle with Alliance agents on the ''Subjugator'', he utilized an All Terrain Scout Transport. ==Appearances== *[[Starfall (adventure)|''Starfall'']] {{Reprint|Starfall (adventure)}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *{{FactFile|121|BLI 1-2|Walex Blissex}} *{{FactFile|130|BLI 3-4|Walex Blissex}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy captains of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
